DATE: 2026-05-27

FORECAST DA PRICES (EUR/MWh):
  Base average:      69.91
  Peak average:      37.95
  Off-peak average:  108.25
  P10:               -5.37
  P90:               127.79

WEEK-OVER-WEEK CHANGE (vs same weekday -7d):
  Base WoW:          -38.86 EUR/MWh
